info.name: NextHospital API - Complete Collection
info.description: NextHospital API collection for backend and mobile consumption. Canonical guide: documentation/MOBILE_API_DEVELOPER_GUIDE.md. Use {{base_url}} for dev (http://localhost/nexthospital/backend/public/api via XAMPP, or http://localhost:8000/api via artisan serve) or production (https://portal.omanyeclinic.com/api). Covers patient, doctor, and staff flows: auth, patients, appointments, consultations, lab, radiology, pharmacy/e-commerce, billing/Paystack, insurance, notifications, teleconsultation/Jitsi, expenses, accounting, wards, ICU, surgery, blood bank, stock counts, audit, emergency, sync, NHIS/GHS.

variable.description: Base API URL. Development: http://localhost/nexthospital/backend/public/api (XAMPP Apache) or http://localhost:8000/api (artisan serve). Android emulator: http://10.0.2.2/nexthospital/backend/public/api. Production: https://portal.omanyeclinic.com/api

request.description: Login user and get access token
Get authenticated user information. Used by mobile after login to persist user/patient data.
Get current patient profile. Mobile uses this for profile screen. Response: success, data (patient object), message.

response.name: Success
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "patient_number": "PAT-0001",
    "first_name": "John",
    "last_name": "Doe",
    "gender": "Male",
    "date_of_birth": "1990-01-01",
    "phone": "0244123456",
    "email": "patient@example.com",
    "address": "123 Main St",
    "nhis_number": null,
    "emergency_contact": null,
    "branch_id": 1
  },
  "message": "Patient retrieved successfully"
}

request.description: Check if appointment can be cancelled
Get patient lab results. Mobile parses data as array of lab requests. Response: success, data (array or paginated), message.

response.name: Success

request.description: Get patient invoices (mobile). Query: status, page, limit. Response: success, data (array of invoices), meta (pagination), message.
Get doctor-specific dashboard. Used by mobile doctor dashboard. Response: success, data (today_appointments, completed_consultations, pending_consultations, etc.), message.
